/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib CMakeFiles/test_reconstruct.dir/tests/test_reconstruct.cpp.o -o test_reconstruct  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/bert.cpp -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/bert.cpp/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-metal libsbert.2.0.dylib bert_build/libbert.3.12.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/libggml.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/libggml-base.0.12.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib -framework Accelerate
